advice: Today create a small 'disorder' — disrupt the plan, surprise. Or notice a deception.
affirmation: Chaos too is part of creation. I do not stick to the status quo.

name: Divine Child-Lover (Krishna)
essence: Krishna is the blue-skinned divine child playing the flute. Lila — the symbol of divine play. Also a teacher of wild love.
lightAspect: Spirit of play, wisdom through love, the power of music, lightness within wisdom.
shadowAspect: Constantly playing — refusing responsibility. Scattering love.
dreamMeaning: Sound of a flute in a dream, a meadow, a blue-skinned child — Krishna. Life calls you to 'play'.
wakingMeaning: Have you become too serious? Krishna says: play. Wisdom is not the companion of seriousness but of lightness.
advice: Today play 'play' for 10 minutes — move with music, play with a child, do something silly. Without reason.
affirmation: Life is play. My lightness does not diminish my depth.

name: Devoted Servant (Hanuman)
essence: Hanuman the monkey god, fully devoted to Rama. The strength reached through devotion — carrying mountains, crossing oceans.
lightAspect: Genuine devotion, serving strength, transcending self-centeredness.
shadowAspect: Enslavement, loss of boundary, losing yourself by attaching to another.
dreamMeaning: A monkey in a dream, carrying a mountain, crossing a sea — Hanuman. The desire for real devotion is inside.
wakingMeaning: Are you devoted to someone / something? Hanuman says: this is beautiful. But first know clearly 'to whom or what' you are devoted.
advice: Today name a concept / person you are devoted to. Awareness gives strength.
affirmation: Devotion is strength. But my loyalty is first to my own essence.

name: Pir / Veli (Sufi)
essence: The Pir in Sufism is the head of the order, the guide of the spiritual path. The Veli is 'one close to God'. The social image of the matured soul.
lightAspect: Maturity, showing the way, tolerance, the state of service.
shadowAspect: False messianism, owning the disciple ego-fully, spiritual narcissism.
dreamMeaning: Meeting a dervish in a dream, a white-bearded sage, visiting a tomb — Pir. A spiritual guidance is opening within.
wakingMeaning: Are you looking for a spiritual path? Pir says: the path begins from within. The outer guide is also recognised by the inner voice.
advice: Today sit silently for 5 minutes, listen to the 'pir' voice that comes from within. Maybe a sentence, maybe a feeling.
affirmation: The pir is inside me. My maturity comes from myself.

name: Hero of the Oppressed (Spartacus)
essence: Spartacus, the figure who began the Roman gladiator-slave revolt. Archetype of standing for the oppressed.
lightAspect: Courage to stand against injustice, collective desire for freedom, solidarity.
shadowAspect: Sticking to the rebel identity. Mistaking destruction for solution.
dreamMeaning: Breaking chains in a dream, leading a crowd, a revolution scene — Spartacus. An oppressed area inside wants to rise.
wakingMeaning: Do you feel injustice in some area? Spartacus says: speak. You are not alone.
advice: Today take a small step against an injustice — a word, message, signature. Even alone, it's a beginning.
affirmation: I do not remain silent before injustice. Unity is strength.

name: Mourning Mother (Mary / Pieta)
essence: The Virgin Mary, when her son was taken from the cross, carried him in her lap. 'Pieta' — the pure state of mourning. Symbol of the capacity to carry loss with love.
lightAspect: Capacity to mourn, looking at loss with love, bearing pain in compassion.
shadowAspect: Victim-mother complex, turning pain into identity.
dreamMeaning: Carrying a body in your lap in a dream, a mourning scene, silent tears — Pieta. You are processing a mourning; own it.
wakingMeaning: Have you experienced a loss (person, relationship, dream)? Pieta says: mourning is not weakness, it is the final language of your love.
advice: Today name a loss. Light a candle or write a note. Mourning that becomes visible begins to flow.
affirmation: I have the right to mourn. I carry my loss with love.

name: Mature Masculine King (King)
essence: In Moore-Gillette's 'mature masculine' typology the King is the archetype of centre and responsibility. He decides not from ego but from the field.
lightAspect: Genuine authority, owning the field, lifting others, setting vision.
shadowAspect: Tyrant (control freak) or Weak King (fleeing responsibility).
dreamMeaning: A crown in a dream, owning a kingdom, the throne room — King. The 'centre' role calls in some area.
wakingMeaning: Are you the roof of your surroundings? King says: this load is carried with power. Don't decide from ego — decide from the field.
advice: Today, when making a decision, ask not yourself but the 'field' (family, team, community): what is best for it?
affirmation: My responsibility is not for my ego but for my service. Mature kingship flows from the field.

name: Mature Feminine Queen (Queen)
essence: The Queen form of the mature feminine — inner authority, emotional intelligence, the ability to hold space. She governs from bond, not ego.
lightAspect: Inner authority, holding space, emotional intelligence, refined power.
shadowAspect: Manipulator (control with grace) or the girl afraid of her power (refusing authority).
dreamMeaning: A queen in a dream, a crowned woman, sitting at the head of the table — Queen. The mature feminine voice inside wants to rise.
wakingMeaning: Are you carrying 'leadership' secretly in an area? Queen says: own it. Be visible.
advice: Today in some area 'say your view' — openly, not pulled back. Mature feminine authority does not fear being seen.
affirmation: I have inner authority. To be visible is my right.

name: Enlightened Sage (Buddha)
essence: Buddha means 'the awakened one'. Under the bodhi tree he liberated himself from his inner chains. Both goal and path archetype of awakening.
lightAspect: Full awareness, ego death, universal compassion, purity of the moment.
shadowAspect: Spiritual pride ('I am enlightened'), passive wisdom, indifference to the world.
dreamMeaning: Awakening while seated in a dream, filling with light, sitting under a bodhi tree — Buddha. There is a sign of awakening within.
wakingMeaning: Have you experienced an 'understanding' lately? Buddha says: celebrate but don't cling. Enlightenment is a process.
advice: Today 10 minutes only breath — no thinking. Consciousness begins here.
affirmation: Awakening is possible. I make room for enlightenment.

name: World Mother (Gaia)
essence: Gaia is the first goddess of the earth in Greek mythology. Modern ecology theory (Lovelock) treats Earth as a single living system — the Gaia hypothesis.
lightAspect: Holistic thinking, ecological consciousness, planetary responsibility.
shadowAspect: Abstract ecologism — not turning into concrete action, calling nature 'goddess' while destroying her in practice.
dreamMeaning: Seeing Earth from space in a dream, the blue-green sphere, nature herself — Gaia. Wide perspective calls.
wakingMeaning: Are you looking too narrowly at your individual life? Gaia says: zoom out. You are a part — and the whole is in the part.
advice: Today do a 'contribution to the world' action — small (recycle, water a plant).
affirmation: I and the world are one whole. I have the right to think holistically.

name: Lost Twin
essence: Many mythologies have twin figures — one lost, one searching. Castor and Pollux, Romulus and Remus. The search for the complementary side.
lightAspect: Recognising the complement, inner dialogue, integrating the 'me'.
shadowAspect: Seeking completion in another, projection, the obsession 'who is my half-orange'.
dreamMeaning: Finding your twin in a dream, a lost sibling, two matched figures — Lost Twin. A missing side seeks inside you.
wakingMeaning: Have you thought 'I found my complement' in someone? Lost Twin says: first see the inner reflection of that complement.
advice: Today think of a side that is your 'exact opposite'. That is also inside you — recognise without judgement.
affirmation: I look for my complement first inside, not outside.

name: Super-Mother (Devouring Mother)
essence: Jung's 'devouring mother' archetype — motherhood that strangles with love, controls, won't release the child. As external mothers and as inner voice.
lightAspect: This archetype is not bright — recognising it is bright.
shadowAspect: Smothering love, control, evoking guilt, not letting the (real / symbolic) child be independent.
dreamMeaning: Being engulfed by a woman in a dream, squeezed in a lap, unable to breathe — Devouring Mother. There is a smothering feeling in a bond.
wakingMeaning: Is mother (real or inner) smothering you? Devouring Mother says: even 'in the name of love' you have the right to set a boundary.
advice: Today create a small distance in a bond where you are suffocating — 1 hour quiet, 1 day unanswered.
affirmation: Love should not smother. My boundary gives me my own breath.

name: Face of Evil (Adversary)
essence: Every mythology has an 'enemy' figure — testing the hero, reminding him of difficulty. The outer face of our inner shadow.
lightAspect: This archetype gains value when approached internally — to know your enemy is to know yourself.
shadowAspect: Not seeing your own shadow by producing an outer enemy, paranoia, collective enmity.
dreamMeaning: An enemy chasing you in a dream, someone running after you, fighting — Adversary. The moment of meeting the shadow.
wakingMeaning: Do you see too much 'enemy' in someone? Adversary says: what is mirrored there? A question opens the door.
advice: Today think of the quality that bothers you most in an 'enemy'. Is it in you in micro form? Look without judgement.
affirmation: My enemy is my mirror. When I recognise him he loses his power.

name: Lost Child
essence: The 'lost child' role in family-system therapy — the silent, neglected child whose presence isn't seen. As an adult: the obsession 'not to cause trouble'.
lightAspect: Independence, ability to enjoy alone, tolerance of silence.
shadowAspect: Fear of being seen, inability to voice needs, chronic 'don't take too much space' pressure.
dreamMeaning: Being invisible in a dream, not being called, forgotten somewhere — Lost Child. An unseen side inside wants a voice.
wakingMeaning: Do you fear 'taking too much space' in life? Lost Child says: space is your right. Let your need be seen.
advice: Today voice a small need — make a sound. 'I want'.
affirmation: I have the right to be seen. My needs deserve being voiced.

name: Modern Mystic
essence: The modern mystic belongs to no single tradition, synthesising their own way from many sources. Yoga + therapy + Jung + meditation.
lightAspect: Capacity for synthesis, resistance to dogma, building personal spiritual practice.
shadowAspect: Skimming everything, lack of depth, spiritual market shopping.
dreamMeaning: Seeing symbols of multiple traditions together in a dream, a room with several altars — Modern Mystic.
wakingMeaning: Is your spiritual path multi-sourced? Modern Mystic says: this is the age's gift. But don't forget to deepen in one.
advice: Today apply just one (only one) of your spiritual practices for 30 minutes with awareness.
affirmation: I can be nourished from many sources. But deepening is also a right.

name: Crone (Elder)
essence: The third state of the triple goddess (Maiden-Mother-Crone). The Crone — the woman who carries her age and wisdom, who speaks no longer from fertility but from wisdom.
lightAspect: Mature wisdom, independence, capacity for acceptance, direct speech.
shadowAspect: Harshness, closing doors, not making space for the new generation.
dreamMeaning: An old woman in a dream, a grandmother, a silver-haired voice — Crone. The old wise feminine within speaks.
wakingMeaning: Do you hear 'wisdom from your age' in some area? Crone says: say it. Ageing is a gift.
advice: Today think of a Crone figure in your life — remember one sentence of theirs. Honour.
affirmation: Ageing is wisdom. I do not hold my voice back.

name: Liminal Being
essence: Anthropologist Van Gennep's 'liminal' concept — in passage rituals, the one who has lost an identity but not yet acquired the new one. The being at the threshold.
lightAspect: Embracing transition, acceptance of uncertainty, focusing on 'what will you do' rather than 'who are you'.
shadowAspect: Getting stuck on the threshold, fear of being nothing, clinging to the old identity.
dreamMeaning: On a bridge in a dream, at a threshold, being neither inside nor out — Liminal Being. You are right in the middle of a transition.
wakingMeaning: Old you isn't, new you isn't yet? Liminal says: this state is real. Don't rush a new identity.
advice: Today consciously accept 'what I don't yet know'. Write a sentence: 'I know I am in between right now.'
affirmation: Being on the threshold is not to be feared. I carry the sanctity of passage.
